Report.title: Fault Report
Report.description: A report of a municipal infrastructure fault submitted via MuniLens.

photoUrl.description: Base64 JPEG data URI of the captured photo

description.description: Optional field notes from the reporter

reporterUid.description: Firebase Auth UID of the submitting user

reporterName.description: Display name or email of the reporter

routedTo.description: AI-determined municipal department e.g. Water & Sanitation Department

User.title: User Profile
User.description: MuniLens user profile stored in Firestore, created on first sign-in.

uid.description: Firebase Auth UID — matches the document ID

phoneNumber.description: Optional phone number shown in admin panel

province.description: South African province e.g. Western Cape

enabled.description: If false, user cannot submit reports

id.description: Duplicate of uid — required for Firestore rule immutability check

StudySummary.title: Study Summary
StudySummary.description: AI-generated study content owned by a user (subcollection under /users).

userId.description: Denormalized owner UID — must match parent /users/{userId}

/reports/{reportId}.description: Collection of all MuniLens fault reports.

access.read: Admin, or the citizen who created the report (reporterUid == auth.uid)
access.create: Any authenticated, enabled citizen — validated by isValidReport()

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles and roles. Document ID == uid.

access.create: Owner only — role must be citizen unless email is admin email
access.update: Owner (cannot change role or enabled) or admin

/users/{userId}/studySummaries/{summaryI.description: Private AI study summaries per user.

access.create: Owner only — userId field must match path userId
access.update: Owner only — userId field is immutable

notes.photoUrl_size: Base64 JPEG at 0.7 quality for 640x480 is ~80-120KB. Firestore document limit is 1MB — this is safe but consider Firebase Storage for larger images in future.
notes.admin_email: willselepe21@gmail.com is hardcoded as the bootstrap admin in both Firestore rules and the isAdmin() helper.
notes.importance_vs_blueprint: The original blueprint was missing: importance, routedTo, estimatedSolution, address, reporterName, and the Electrical Damage enum value. All are now included.
notes.id_field: The User entity requires both uid and id fields set to the same value — uid is the semantic owner ID, id is required by the Firestore rule immutability check (request.resource.data.id == resource.data.id).
